tagline: Turn rough ideas into polished creative directions.

designSystem.style: Modern creative tool with vibrant violet-purple accent, warm amber highlights, and clean card-based layout. Supports full light and dark themes with polished gradients and subtle borders.

screens: Create (Home) — multi-mode input (text, photo, voice, sketch) with AI brief generation and animated loading state
Drafts — searchable, filterable list of saved creative briefs with color palette previews
Moodboard — detailed visual direction explorer with palette strips, style keywords, and reference cards
Collaboration — shared concept cards with comment threads, collaborator avatars, and approval flow
Settings — profile overview, light/dark theme toggle, preferences, and account management
